Flagship Pclika development board built around the ESP32-S3. Dual-core Xtensa LX7 at 240 MHz with 16 MB Flash and 8 MB PSRAM. The MCP-optimized firmware stack exposes GPIO, I2C, SPI, UART and PWM through the bridge protocol.

## Hardware Specifications

  - **Chip**: ESP32-S3 (Xtensa LX7 dual-core 240MHz)
  - **Voltage**: 3.3V / 5V USB-C
  - **Protocol**: GPIO, I2C, SPI, UART, PWM, ADC
  - **Pins**: 38 GPIO (26 usable)
  - **Dimensions**: 68 x 53 x 1.6 mm
  - **Weight**: 18 g
